experience.title: Experience
experience.shortBio: Building accessible, pixel-perfect digital experiences ── user-centered design & technical innovation

intro.headline: Fullstack Engineer · Design Engineer
intro.p2: Saya suka explore cara-cara baru buat berekspresi tanpa batas. Selalu tertarik sama detail kecil yang mungkin sering kelewatan tapi kerasa impact-nya ── Nge-bridge gap antara user-centered design & technical problem solving lewat aplikasi, interface, dan interaksi yang seamless.
intro.p3: Sejauh ini, saya beruntung bisa kolaborasi bareng tim keren di {baf}, {deloitte}, {codeid}, dan lainnya.

codeidFront.desc: Fokus nge-maintain multi-platform UI framework. Nge-bridge gap antara brand design dan implementasi frontend yang kompleks.

codeidSpecialist.desc: Peran hybrid yang nge-combine project management, UI/UX design, business analysis, dan manual QA testing buat mastiin aplikasi didevelop dengan solid dan user-centered.

bafFront.desc: Ngedeliver clean code, maintenance, serta nambahin fitur-fitur baru buat sales order management system internal. Aplikasi ini dipakai tim sales buat input data order dan nge-track status order secara real-time.

uob.title: UOB Infinity
uob.desc: Contributed to UOB Infinity digital banking by developing secure payment features, optimizing transaction workflows, and delivering responsive user experiences.

sandiabaf.title: Sandia BAF
sandiabaf.desc: Engineered finance solutions for sales and credit management, streamlining business processes through modern web technologies and scalable application architecture.

telkomedika.title: Telkomedika
telkomedika.desc: Built AI-powered healthcare platforms that provide health monitoring, medical analytics, and intelligent dashboards to support patient care and operational efficiency.
